headline: Homes.com Shares Most Expensive Home Sales Across Major U.S. Markets in February
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., March 17, 2026--Homes.com, a CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) leading online residential marketplace, published the most expensive publicly marketed home sales across major U.S. metropolitan areas for the month of February.
